navigation.archive_path: homepage -> /selj-archive/ -> .loop-item.pt-publication entries -> /publications/{slug}/ detail -> direct PDF in /wp-content/uploads/
navigation.notes: WordPress on law.stanford.edu (multi-tenant). Routed via StanfordSTLRAdapter, which falls through to WordPressAcademicBaseAdapter for non-STLR seeds. Many archive entries link directly to PDFs in /wp-content/uploads/; some only link to /publications/{slug}/ detail pages where the PDF is embedded. FacetWP pager uses ?_paged=N. Re-onboard: replaces stub registry_stanford_environmental_law_journal_481_2ede92f882.json. Requires browser-like UA (curl with default UA returns 403). Smoke test PASSED (PDF on disk) but per-article metadata is weak: WP fallback returns page <title> and aggregated authors instead of per-article title/authors; volume/issue not captured; year reflects fetch date not publication. Per-article metadata should be filled by post-download PDF first-page extractor.
